original code: Monolithic read() handled sequence input, URI resolution, extension dispatch, VTK/meshio fallback in one body.
refactored code: Split into helpers: _read_sequence (209-215), _resolve_uri_or_file (218-238), _read_from_extension (241-265), _read_with_vtk_or_meshio (268-299), then orchestrated from read().

original code: Nested functions read_keyword/read_buffer/read_keywords embedded inside read_grdecl().
refactored code: Introduced _GRDECLParser class to encapsulate GRDECL parsing responsibilities and invoked parser from read_grdecl().
Replaced conditional chain with dispatch_table mapping tokens to handlers (_handle_mapunits/_handle_mapaxes/_handle_gridunit/_handle_specgrid), plus INCLUDE and generic-key handlers.

original code: plot() directly managed show() arguments and multiple setup branches inline.
refactored code: Added _ShowOptions parameter object and extracted setup helpers (_configure_anti_aliasing, _set_plot_background, _configure_camera_and_effects) called from plot().

original code: Duplicate volume-vs-mesh conditional existed across list and non-list item paths.
refactored code: Centralized add decision in _add_plot_item and reused via _add_var_item for list/scalar paths.
